audit_items.proof_trace: The property holds. In the new-auction eligibility branch (auctionStart == 0, L255-265), line 257 unambiguously reads IERC20(asset).balanceOf(feeAggregator); the inline comment at L262-263 confirms this is intentional. The contract holds zero balance for non-live assets because _onAuctionEnd (L383-397) transfers any residue back to feeAggregator before deleting s_auctionStarts, so counting only feeAggregator balance is correct. The NatSpec phrase 'in both the fee aggregator and the auction contract' is imprecise; at eligibility-check time the contract portion is always zero.
